ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "buy_price" TEXT /* Buy price of the song (e.g., 3200, NFS) */,
  "sell_price" INTEGER /* Sell price of the song */,
  "color_1" TEXT /* Primary color of the song (e.g., Brown, Light blue) */,
  "color_2" TEXT /* Secondary color of the song (e.g., Orange, None) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the song (e.g., 1x1) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source where the song was obtained */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album name where the song is featured */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist or band that performed the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "is_instrumental" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the song is instrumental */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyricist" TEXT /* Name of the lyricist */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Name of the composer */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "bpm" INTEGER /* Beats per minute of the song */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood or atmosphere of the song */,
  "sound_effect" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the song is a sound effect */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the audio file (e.g., MP3, WAV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., K.K. concert, Nook Shopping Catalog) */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., concert, in-game event, downloadable content) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event if the source is a concert or in-game event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song version */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the song */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_versions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyric entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song this lyric belongs to */,
  "lyric_text" TEXT /* Text of the lyric */,
  "lyricist" TEXT /* Name of the lyricist */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the lyrics */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the song these lyrics belong to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES song_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalogs" (
  "catalog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalog entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "catalog_name" TEXT /* Name of the catalog */,
  "catalog_type" TEXT /* Type of catalog (e.g., digital, physical) */,
  "catalog_description" TEXT /* Description of the catalog */,
  "availability_start_date" TEXT /* Date the song became available in the catalog */,
  "availability_end_date" TEXT /* Date the song will no longer be available in the catalog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalogs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, sound designer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the song */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the song was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the song */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the song */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the song (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filenames" (
  "filename_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filename entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song this filename belongs to */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the song */,
  "file_location" TEXT /* Location where the file is stored */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filename_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filenames_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internal_ids" (
  "internal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internal ID entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song this internal ID belongs to */,
  "internal_id_value" INTEGER /* Internal ID value */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the internal ID is used (e.g., PC, console) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the internal ID was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the internal ID was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internal_ids_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
